_comment: Source of truth. Run 'npm run sync' to enrich from GitHub API → src/data/portfolio.json

override.description: Deca is an intelligent English learning platform that combines spaced repetition, AI-powered feedback, and interactive listening practice to accelerate vocabulary and phrase acquisition.
override.overview: Deca is a personal English learning tool I built to explore AI integration in education. The app focuses on practical phrase learning through structured topic management, listening comprehension exercises, and real-time pronunciation feedback — inspired by how native speakers actually learn through context and repetition.
features: 📚 Topic & Phrase Management: Organize vocabulary into topics with full CRUD support, bulk import, and filtering.
🎧 Listening Practice Mode: Audio playback with progress tracking; users transcribe what they hear, with intelligent answer normalization.
💡 Smart Hint System: Progressive word-by-word hints, color-coded diff visualization (correct/hinted/hidden).
🔤 Pronunciation Cards: Click any word to view IPA (UK/US), listen to accent-specific pronunciation.
🤖 AI Integration: AI-assisted phrase suggestions and learning feedback.
⌨️ Keyboard Shortcut Support: Hotkey bindings for hands-free study flow.

backend: Built a Next.js API layer with file-based routing to serve topics, phrases, and AI completions.
Integrated external dictionary API (dictionaryapi.dev) and translation API (MyMemory) for real-time IPA and meaning lookup.
Implemented server-side AI proxy to securely forward requests to language model APIs without exposing keys on the client.
frontend: Developed a responsive SPA with Next.js 15 (App Router) and TypeScript, leveraging React Server Components where appropriate.
Styled with TailwindCSS using a consistent design token system with state-driven progressive disclosure.
Used TanStack Query for server-state management, caching topic/phrase data and handling background refetching.
Integrated Web Speech API (SpeechSynthesis) with custom progress tracking for audio playback simulation.

override.description: Trava is a comprehensive Task Management and Team Collaboration System designed to streamline project workflows.
override.overview: Trava is a multi-workspace task management system. I developed this project to explore Clean Architecture and modern web technologies, focusing on high scalability and a smooth user experience for team collaboration.
features: 🔐 Member Management: Secure registration, login, personal profile management, and security updates.
🏢 Workspace Management (Spaces): Supports Private and Team space models with clear role-based access control.
📩 Invitation System: Mechanism to send/receive Workspace invitations and manage invitation statuses in real-time.
✅ Task Management: Supports complex Task structures (Parent/Sub-tasks) with priority levels and workloads.
🔔 Notification System: Provides real-time updates on Space changes, Task assignments, and deadline reminders.

backend: Engineered a scalable RESTful API with .NET 8, implementing Clean Architecture to decouple the domain core from infrastructure.
Utilized CQRS pattern with MediatR to separate read/write models, drastically optimizing complex database queries.
Integrated Redis for high-speed distributed caching of frequently accessed workspace configurations.
Secured endpoints using JWT authentication with granular Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
frontend: Developed a highly responsive Single Page Application (SPA) leveraging Angular and TailwindCSS.
Built reusable and accessible UI components extensively utilizing the PrimeNG component library.
Ensured client-side security with strict generic Authentication Route Guards and centralized HTTP Interceptors.

override.description: Phygen is an AI-Powered Physics Exam Generator System that helps teachers create exams automatically.
override.overview: Phygen leverages AI to automate the creation of physics exams for high school students. It supports custom difficulty levels and topic selection, generating high-quality questions and detailed explanations instantly.
features: 🏫 Curriculum Management: Flexible organization by Curriculum → Subject → Chapter → Topic → Section.
📝 Question Bank: Supports various question types, media attachments via Cloudinary, and categorization by difficulty.
⚙️ Automated Exam Generation: Builds detailed exam matrices and automatically synthesizes exams.
💳 Payment Integration: Supports secure transactions via the PayOS gateway.
🔐 Security & Authentication: Login/Registration with Email OTP, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC).
📄 Document Publishing: Supports exporting exams and documents to Word/PDF formats.

backend: Architected a robust document generation backend using .NET 8 with Clean Architecture principles.
Integrated advanced LLMs (ChatGPT and Gemini APIs) to procedurally synthesize curriculum-accurate physics exam matrices.
Implemented secure payment processing workflows with external PayOS webhooks, ensuring ACID compliance.
Boosted API responsiveness with comprehensive response optimization strategies using Redis.
frontend: Crafted a specialized, interactive React SPA focused on fluid user experiences during complex exam generation.
Implemented real-time streaming and previews of AI-generated text and LaTeX mathematical formulas.
Engineered complex state management to track curriculum trees, dynamic exam matrices, and payment transactions.

override.description: TimeSwap is a Time Exchange and Job Marketplace Platform connecting users for skill sharing and services.
override.overview: TimeSwap creates a marketplace where users can exchange services using a 'time' currency. It includes robust job listing, search, and application systems with an integrated E-Wallet for secure transactions.
features: 👤 User Authentication: Login / Register with email, Forgot Password, Secure Logout.
📋 Job Management: Listings, Search by name/fee/industry/location, Post Job, Apply for Jobs, Applicant List.
🤖 AI Chatbot Integration: Integrated ChatGPT API to assist users with job-related inquiries.
💳 Payment Management: E-Wallet Integration for seamless transactions with Transaction History.
📄 User Profile Management: View & Edit Profile, Account Information with subscription details.

backend: Developed a high-performance backend ecosystem using .NET 8 supporting high volumes of transactional 'Time' exchanges.
Engineered a bulletproof E-Wallet ledger system within PostgreSQL using optimistic concurrency.
Automated CI/CD pipelines for seamless, zero-downtime deployments onto scalable DigitalOcean droplets.
frontend: Built a Progressive Web App (PWA) oriented SPA with Angular 18 focusing on lightning-fast job discovery.
Deeply integrated Google Maps API for geospatial search, enabling users to find local freelance opportunities.
Designed a polished dashboard layout employing TailwindCSS and PrimeNG for complex data grids.
mobile: Developed a native Android application using modern Kotlin standards and the declarative Jetpack Compose UI toolkit.
Architected the mobile client with MVVM pattern alongside Android Architecture Components.
Utilized Retrofit and Coroutines/Flow for asynchronous network requests ensuring smooth scrolling in job feeds.

override.description: A large-scale content migration project for an enterprise client using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM).
override.overview: This project involved migrating and validating thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms to Adobe Experience Manager. I ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
features: 📄 Large-Scale Migration: Migrated and validated thousands of landing pages from legacy CMS platforms.
✅ Content Consistency: Ensured structural integrity and content consistency across global enterprise environments.
🔄 Agile Governance: Followed strictly governed Agile workflows for enterprise deployment and collaboration.

backend: Worked extensively with AEM Content Fragments and components.
Validated landing pages for data accuracy and consistency.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in a large-scale project.
